title: Difference Between Ones and Zeros in Row and Column
titleCn: 行和列中一和零的差值

testcases.input: grid = [[0,1,1],[1,0,1],[0,0,1]] Output: [[0,0,4],[0,0,4],[-2,-2,2]] Explanation: - diff[0][0] = onesRow0 + onesCol0 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol0 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[0][1] = onesRow0 + onesCol1 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol1 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[0][2] = onesRow0 + onesCol2 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol2 = 2 + 3 - 1 - 0 = 4 - diff[1][0] = onesRow1 + onesCol0 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol0 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[1][1] = onesRow1 + onesCol1 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol1 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[1][2] = onesRow1 + onesCol2 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol2 = 2 + 3 - 1 - 0 = 4 - diff[2][0] = onesRow2 + onesCol0 - zerosRow2 - zerosCol0 = 1 + 1 - 2 - 2 = -2 - diff[2][1] = onesRow2 + onesCol1 - zerosRow2 - zerosCol1 = 1 + 1 - 2 - 2 = -2 - diff[2][2] = onesRow2 + onesCol2 - zerosRow2 - zerosCol2 = 1 + 3 - 2 - 0 = 2
testcases.expectedOutput: [[0,0,4],[0,0,4],[-2,-2,2]] Explanation: - diff[0][0] = onesRow0 + onesCol0 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol0 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[0][1] = onesRow0 + onesCol1 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol1 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[0][2] = onesRow0 + onesCol2 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol2 = 2 + 3 - 1 - 0 = 4 - diff[1][0] = onesRow1 + onesCol0 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol0 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[1][1] = onesRow1 + onesCol1 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol1 = 2 + 1 - 1 - 2 = 0 - diff[1][2] = onesRow1 + onesCol2 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol2 = 2 + 3 - 1 - 0 = 4 - diff[2][0] = onesRow2 + onesCol0 - zerosRow2 - zerosCol0 = 1 + 1 - 2 - 2 = -2 - diff[2][1] = onesRow2 + onesCol1 - zerosRow2 - zerosCol1 = 1 + 1 - 2 - 2 = -2 - diff[2][2] = onesRow2 + onesCol2 - zerosRow2 - zerosCol2 = 1 + 3 - 2 - 0 = 2

testcases.input: grid = [[1,1,1],[1,1,1]] Output: [[5,5,5],[5,5,5]] Explanation: - diff[0][0] = onesRow0 + onesCol0 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol0 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[0][1] = onesRow0 + onesCol1 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol1 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[0][2] = onesRow0 + onesCol2 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol2 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[1][0] = onesRow1 + onesCol0 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol0 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[1][1] = onesRow1 + onesCol1 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol1 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[1][2] = onesRow1 + onesCol2 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol2 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5
testcases.expectedOutput: [[5,5,5],[5,5,5]] Explanation: - diff[0][0] = onesRow0 + onesCol0 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol0 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[0][1] = onesRow0 + onesCol1 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol1 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[0][2] = onesRow0 + onesCol2 - zerosRow0 - zerosCol2 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[1][0] = onesRow1 + onesCol0 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol0 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[1][1] = onesRow1 + onesCol1 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol1 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5 - diff[1][2] = onesRow1 + onesCol2 - zerosRow1 - zerosCol2 = 3 + 2 - 0 - 0 = 5
